title: Porcupine, Snake, & Company
content:
Going shares with the Snakes, Porcupine
    Said--"the best of the bargain is mine:"
    Nor would he back down,
    When the snake would disown
    The agreement his quills made them sign.

    Hasty Partnerships May Be Repented Of
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "Porcupine, Snake, & Company"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
